differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS) syndrome
next_steps: Isolate the patient to prevent potential transmission of varicella
Perform PCR testing for VZV and HSV from vesicle fluid and ulcer base
Obtain serology for HIV, syphilis (RPR/VDRL and Treponema-specific), and VZV
Perform a punch biopsy of an active lesion for histopathology and immunohistochemistry
Consult infectious disease for consideration of empiric intravenous acyclovir
Complete blood count with differential, liver function tests, and inflammatory markers
